summary:
Switched file ingestion to read the whole input into a growable `Vec` before transforming so files larger than 64 KB are no longer truncated (`src/main.rs:11-19`).  

Tests executed:
- `PATH=$PWD/target/debug:$PATH ./test.sh`

Next steps:
1. `cargo install --path . --force` (or copy `target/debug/fileproc` into your `$PATH`) so the global `fileproc` binary picks up the fix.
